title: Totem of Undying Muzan
description: This Totem Factory DBX pack transforms the Totem of Undying into a pixel-art design of Muzan Kibutsuji.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7056678398e60ce89dd9aec7ed7d78f1b0dda81.png)

# ✨ Demon Slayer Totem – Muzan Kibutsuji

Carry the terrifying presence of the Demon King himself.
This Totem Factory DBX pack transforms the Totem of Undying into a pixel-art design of **Muzan Kibutsuji**, bringing his cold authority and sinister aura into Minecraft survival. Perfect for fans who love powerful villains and dark anime themes.

## ⭐ Features

- 🎨 Custom Totem of Undying retextured as **Muzan Kibutsuji**

- ✨ Pixel-art style faithful to Demon Slayer aesthetics

- 🩸 Inspired by Muzan’s role as the first and strongest demon

- ⚡ Works seamlessly with other Totem Factory DBX packs

- 📦 Lightweight .zip resource pack, vanilla-friendly

## 🔧 Installation

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it inside your **resourcepacks** folder
3. Activate in Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Survive with the Demon King watching over your revival.

## 🖌️ Credits

Inspiration: **Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba** (Koyoharu Gotouge)
